title: Start The Project

description: Where the quest's changelog was actually getting documentation.

title: Slap ID Lookup
description: Admin tool to look up a players' slap id.

title: Franchise Hub
description: A hub to show off each franchise.

title: Franchises Groundwork
description: Build the database to support Franchise representation

title: Franchise Hall of Fame
description: Allow Franchises to show off their retired jersey numbers.

title: Basic Embeding for home page
description: Makes this thing look like less of a scam link when throwing it into discord.

title: Make a Navbar
description: Put a navbar for the major pages on the top left.

title: Build the homepage
description: Build a Splashpage so people dont auto-load to the player stat leaderboard

title: Fix Assists
description: Some seasons have Assists, others have Prim and Sec assists, Some have both.  Make the site do math.

title: Franchise Career Stats
description: give the Franchises a Career Stat section like the Team Pages do.

title: Franchise Logos
description: Use Franchise Logos on the Franchsie cards.

title: Team Cards show Franchises
description: Style the Members of a Franchise's cards to show their role.

title: System for Merging Player Names
description: People change names.  We need to be ready for that.

title: System for Merging Team Stats
description: Teams rebrand. Teams have West/Central/East counterparts. Lets be ready for both.

title: Overhaul Players Leaderboard to show all Slapshot Stats
description: nuff said

title: Championship Clock
description: build the math man to do math and calculate who won the championship. And who should recieve credit for it based on the SPL Handbook Thresholds.

title: Player Stat Percentiles
description: Requested by Tee. Show the top percentile for each Player Career Stat.

title: Add system to support team logos / team colors
description: nuff said

title: Player Alias System
description: Merged player name changes under stable player IDs.

title: Iron Man Streaks
description: Track consecutive regular-season games played for a player.

title: Chip Leaderboard
description: Give the people a hub to chip check eachother. (Also make it support Teams / Franchises)

title: Figure out Window Resizing
description: No idea how this works. Will need to learn it at some point.

title: Player Comparison
description: Compare two players' stats.  Also provide a Projected to show what the stats would be if both players had the same amount of Games Played

title: Click + Drag for Player Leaderboard
description: Not everyone knows Shift + Scroll goes side to side. The leaderboard needs to be intuitive.

title: Navbar Upgrayedd
description: Spelled with 2 D's for a double dose of pimping.  Make a second menu that sorts vertically that shows up after the header has disappeared.

title: FRANCHISES TO ADD
description: Both Torontos (Narhwals / Seals | Spinach Toronto), Quebec Flare. Clappers / Clompers, Ghouls (Tokyo, Kyoto), Draft League Franchises.

title: Player Nationality
description: Allow players to rep their Country / State / Province.

title: Team Browser uses Team Metadata instead of Franchise Metadata
description: Let the Teams rep their colors and logos instead of their Franchise's

title: update team cards on player page to fit Team Browser New Theme
description: Team Cards are the first version, they need to match the rest of the website's theme better.

title: Championships Team Cards
description: Use Team Cards for Chips to make repeat winners stand out more.

title: Expected Stats
description: Take set lineup verses histories to make an expected array of stats, then compare the real match results to get the outcome. - shoutout Noah

title: User Generated Shot Maps on the match results pages
description: Give the people the power. Make a tool to allow the user to click on a map, set Shot on goal, Blocked, Goal, along with Team/Player. - shoutout Noah

title: Team pages use Team Themes
description: the cards are cool, but the actual team pages could use some love.

title: Structure for Live Seasons
description: set up the backend to run a real season on this site.

title: Season Schedule Importer
description: Dump Scheduleboards into the system and have it generate a schedule that can convert into result pages

title: Result Pages
description: Converts a 'Scheduled' match into a 'Results' page after a game log is reported to M1NNbot.

title: League Standings
description: Set up Standings Pages with Schedule below. Standings Columns need to follow Rank, Team, GP, W, L, OTL, PTS, GF, GA, GD, Last 5.

title: Overhaul Site Nav for Live Seasons
description: Make it more intuitive when seasons are live to browse the website.

title: Look into Real website hosting
description: Staff functionality is going to be hindered with the current hosting. But it might work out, who knows.

title: M1NNBot incorporation
description: Get M1nnbot to upload match results straight to project.

title: Fix JSON encoding
description: Some JSON files dont like to read, figure out why, and fix it.

title: Fix Side Mapping
description: Side mapping is being based off active rosters, not the snapshots. That needs to be fixed.

title: Overhaul the player pages.
description: Displaying current active rosters, overhauling the design to fit the rest of the site's design, styling the team cards with player's career stats on said team.

title: Live Season support for Team.html
description: Show things like Active Roster and Schedule at the top of the Team Pages, IF they're active.

title: Live Division hub
description: Make a 3 column hub for each division, showing the teams, their standings, and their schedule.

title: player jersey numbers
description: add some flair to the player pages by showing their jersey numbers on their team cards.

title: Division Hub
description: Create a tri column hub for each division.  On the left show matches. Results on top, upcoming on bottom.  In the middle show the standings. Add Playoff race view for multi-conference divisions.  On the right show the stat leaders for the major stats.

title: Overhaul stat entry to support live seasons
description: Log parsing requires too much manual work. I need to streamline it more.

title: Summer 2026 Franchises
description: Add the current franchises to the list.

title: Roster Wire
description: Add a news ticker to the division hub to show the latest roster transactions. Click on a card to get a press release.

title: Press Releases for every roster transaction
description: Make the Roster Wire cards clickable with a summary of the move.

title: Stars of the Week right on the website!
description: shoutout Galalendon

title: Roster View Table
description: shoutout Kavorka. A table view with buttons to change the division displayed showing the full roster of each team in the division.
